ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_data" (
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the simulation generation */,
  "agents" INTEGER /* The number of agents evaluated in this generation */,
  "min_score" REAL /* Minimum score achieved by the agents */,
  "max_score" REAL /* Maximum score achieved by the agents */,
  "mean_score" REAL /* Mean score of the agents' performances */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the agents' performances */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the performance data was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the performance data */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run */,
  "agent_performance_details" TEXT /* JSON column to store additional performance details for each agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulation_settings ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the generation being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access log was recorded */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES performance_data ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_settings" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the simulation run */,
  "generation_count" INTEGER /* Number of generations in the simulation */,
  "agent_count" INTEGER /* Total number of agents considered in the simulation */,
  "simulation_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was conducted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the simulation settings were recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the simulation settings */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation run (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the generation analyzed */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Detailed results of the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., statistical, visual) */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* Tool used for the analysis (e.g., Python, R, SQL) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_analysis_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES performance_data ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the generation covered in the report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* The content of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, HTML, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES performance_data ("generation_id")
)
